name: Spicy Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prick the pastry shell with a fork.
2. Preheat the oven to 450°F (232°C).
3. Bake the pastry shell for 8 minutes until lightly browned.
4. In a large bowl, stir together pumpkin, eggs, milk, sweetener, sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, salt, and cloves until well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into the partially baked pie shell.
6. Transfer to the oven and bake at 350°F (177°C) for 50 minutes or until the center is almost set.
7. Allow the pie to cool slightly before refrigerating.
8. Cut into 8 wedges and serve with 2 tablespoons of light vanilla ice cream.
Preparation time: 15 minutes, Cooking time: 50 minutes
